description: Static Site Importer fixture matrix workload that composes upstream WP Codebox recipe contracts while keeping SSI-specific fixture and diagnostic policy in the product repo.

runner_tools.remediation: Use a runner with a WP Codebox binary from HOMEBOY_WP_CODEBOX_BIN that supports fixture-matrix browser validation and visual comparison commands.

check.label: Static Site Importer checkout exists
check.remediation: Pass homeboy bench --path /path/to/static-site-importer or update components.static-site-importer.path before running static-site-importer-fixture-matrix.

check.label: Fixture matrix workload entrypoint exists
check.remediation: Refresh the Static Site Importer checkout before running static-site-importer-fixture-matrix.

check.label: Fixture matrix WP Codebox recipe entrypoint exists
check.remediation: Refresh the Static Site Importer checkout before running static-site-importer-fixture-matrix.

check.label: Hydrated pixelmatch entrypoint exists
check.remediation: Dependencies are missing. Run `homeboy deps install --path /path/to/static-site-importer` so Homeboy hydrates the checkout, then rerun static-site-importer-fixture-matrix.

check.label: Hydrated pngjs entrypoint exists
check.remediation: Dependencies are missing. Run `homeboy deps install --path /path/to/static-site-importer` so Homeboy hydrates the checkout, then rerun static-site-importer-fixture-matrix.

check.label: Static Site Importer transformer adapter exists
check.remediation: Refresh the Static Site Importer checkout before running static-site-importer-fixture-matrix.

check.label: Node.js runtime exists
check.remediation: Use a Homeboy runner with Node.js available on PATH before running static-site-importer-fixture-matrix.

down.label: Remove run-scoped SSI fixture matrix temp resources
